note: Phase 2 trust-boundary control. Every Supabase Edge Function directory must be classified by exposure class. `verifyJwt` records the reviewed gateway JWT requirement; `scripts/governance/check-edge-function-exposure.mjs` fails CI when supabase/config.toml drifts from this manifest. Any function with verifyJwt=false MUST document an internalGuard explaining how it is protected without gateway JWT verification.

classes.public-token: Reachable without a user session. Protected by a per-resource token, signed link, shared secret, or is intentionally public. MUST document an internalGuard.
classes.authenticated-user: Requires a valid Supabase user JWT. No additional role is required beyond authentication.
classes.privileged-role: Requires a valid user JWT and an internal role/capability check (admin, management, logistics, department scope, etc.).
classes.service-only: Invoked by pg_cron, database triggers, or trusted server code with the service role. Not intended for browser callers. When verifyJwt=false it MUST verify the service-role secret or an equivalent internal guard.

auto-send-timesheet-reminders.internalGuard: Distinguishes service_role (pg_cron) from user callers and enforces a profile role check before sending.

cleanup-corporate-email-images.internalGuard: timingSafeEqual comparison of the bearer/apikey against SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; returns 403 otherwise.

csp-report.internalGuard: Browser report endpoint with no credentials. Applies a durable service-role rate limit, reads a size-bounded body, normalizes reports, strips query strings, and writes only normalized records via the service role. Returns 204 with no data.

delete-public-artist-rider.internalGuard: Festival artist form access token validated against the submission before any storage delete; guarded by durable ingress and token/document scoped rate limits.

get-google-maps-key.internalGuard: Verifies the caller JWT with auth.getUser, enforces GOOGLE_MAPS_ALLOWED_ROLES, and consumes a per-user/global daily quota before returning a restricted key.

get-mapbox-token.internalGuard: Applies a durable client-bucket rate limit and returns only the publishable MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN, which is URL-restricted at Mapbox; no secret material is exposed.

get-secret.internalGuard: Management role check; only client-safe allowlisted keys are returned (see ENT-SEC-02 remediation).

notify-staffing-cancellation.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; browser callers must be authenticated admin/management, while service-role calls remain available for internal automation.

send-expense-notification.internalGuard: Database trigger invokes with the service-role bearer token; function performs a timing-safe compare against SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY before sending.

send-job-payout-email.internalGuard: Validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser and requires profiles.role to be admin or management before reading payout overrides or sending email.

send-job-whatsapp-message.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser and requires admin or production department plus a WAHA endpoint before sending.

send-payout-override-notification.internalGuard: Validates the caller JWT with auth.getUser, requires admin/management, and requires payload actorId to match the authenticated user before any service-role reads.

send-staffing-email.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper and bounded JSON parsing; browser callers must be authenticated admin/management, while the staffing orchestrator may call with the service-role key and an audited actor fallback.

send-tour-availability.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper, bounded JSON parsing, and shared admin/management role guard before signing documents or sending email/WhatsApp availability requests.

send-warehouse-message.internalGuard: Uses the shared HTTP wrapper, bounded JSON parsing, and shared admin/management role guard; also requires the caller profile to have a WAHA endpoint before sending warehouse WhatsApp messages.

set-job-preventive-resource.internalGuard: ALLOWED_ROLES set restricts callers to admin/management/logistics.

staffing-click.internalGuard: Opaque per-invitation action token has durable ingress and per-link rate limits, then is validated against the campaign before any state transition.

staffing-orchestrator.internalGuard: Service-role/internal campaign execution; validates caller secret/service role before mutating campaign state.

staffing-sweeper.internalGuard: pg_cron/service-role cleanup of expired campaigns; no user-facing data is returned.

submit-public-artist-form.internalGuard: Festival artist form submissions have durable ingress and token-scoped rate limits before persisting the submission.

system-health.internalGuard: Requires an authenticated admin/management caller; redacts internal errors and records a security audit entry. Liveness moved to the unauthenticated `health` function.

tech-calendar-ics.internalGuard: Per-technician calendar feed token embedded in the subscription URL; guarded by durable ingress and token/client scoped hourly rate limits.

tour-guest-document-url.internalGuard: Tour guest document signing has durable ingress and token/document scoped rate limits before issuing a scoped, time-limited document URL.

upload-public-artist-rider.internalGuard: Festival artist form uploads have a durable ingress bucket plus a token-scoped rate limit before storage writes.

wallboard-auth.internalGuard: Exchanges WALLBOARD_SHARED_TOKEN for a scoped wallboard JWT; fails closed when the shared secret is unset.

wallboard-feed.internalGuard: Validates a signed wallboard JWT or shared token before returning feed data.

health.internalGuard: Liveness/readiness probe. Returns only static status and a timestamp; performs no database or business queries.
